name: psoccallfmem
what_this_is: Real-mode FAR INDIRECT CALL (FF /3) + FAR INDIRECT JMP (FF /5) through memory -- the recently-added paths that had NO gate (only direct 9A CALLF / CB RETF were gated in M9.5). Every transfer loads a m16:16 far pointer from memory, so this also exercises the 16-bit ModRM EA generation feeding the far-pointer load: [bx] (rm=111), [bp+disp8] (mod=01 rm=110, SS DEFAULT), [disp16] (mod=00 rm=110), [bx+si] (rm=000, with a decoy entry so an EA ignoring SI reads garbage), plus a NESTED far indirect call and two far indirect JMPs.
transitions: reset (CS:EIP=F000:FFF0) -> 16-bit real mode (CLI/CLD, SS=ES=0, sp=0x7000, DS=F000); cr0 stays 0x60000010
A: call far [bx] (FF 1F) via ftabA -> calleeA (CX=0x1111) RETFs; SP captured into DX
B: far ptr written to SS:6008, call far [bp+8] (FF 5E 08, SS default) -> calleeB (CX=0x2222) RETFs; SP->DX
C: call far [disp16] (FF 1E) via ftabC -> calleeC (CX=0x3333) RETFs; SP->DX
D: call far [bx+si] (FF 18) via ftabD+4 (decoy at +0) -> calleeD (CX=0x4444) RETFs; SP->DX
E: call far [bx] -> calleeEo (CX=0x5555) does call far [disp16] -> calleeEi (CX=0x6666) RETFs, outer captures SP->DI, CX=0x6655, RETFs; SP->DX
F: jmp far [bx] (FF 2F) -> landF (CX=0x7777; fall-through = 0xDEAD trap)
G: far ptr written to SS:6106, jmp far [bp+6] (FF 6E 06, SS default) -> landG (CX=0x8888; fall-through = 0xBEEF trap)
why_per_record_differential: All seven far transfers are synchronous, deterministic control transfers (CLI'd, no IRQ, no async I/O), so the gen_trace.py --system single-step golden is a valid per-record oracle. compare.py --mode func checks CS/EIP/ESP + GPRs at each step; SP is captured into a register immediately after every RETF so any push/pop width or SP-delta error appears in the register diff, and the far-pointer-load EA errors appear as a wrong next-record CS:EIP.
non_vacuous: The gate asserts BOTH traces produce every callee/landing-pad CX marker (0x1111/0x2222/0x3333/0x4444/0x5555/0x6666/0x6655/0x7777/0x8888) AND reach the final landmark pc (done). The fall-through of each far JMP is a distinct-marker hlt trap, so a no-op transfer cannot reach the landmarks.
description: Bare-metal SoC real-mode far INDIRECT CALL/JMP differential. A real-mode -bios firmware exercises FF /3 (call far m16:16) through [bx], [bp+8] (SS default), [disp16], [bx+si] far-pointer-table forms plus a nested case, and FF /5 (jmp far m16:16) through [bx] and [bp+6]; proves them per-record byte-identical to qemu-system-i386 -cpu pentium with non-vacuous marker + final-pc assertions on both traces.
